EffectiveSpellPower.title: Effective Spell Power
EffectiveSpellPower.comment: This is a custom stat that attempts to give a rough indication of the build's power with magicka attacks.

SprintSpeed.title: Sprint Speed
compute: min(2, 1 + 0.40 + Set.SprintSpeed + Buff.MovementSpeed + Item.MovementSpeed + Set.MovementSpeed + Buff.SprintSpeed + Skill.MovementSpeed + Skill.SprintSpeed + CP.SprintSpeed + Mundus.MovementSpeed)

LAFlameStaff.title: Light Attack Flame Staff
compute: 1 + CP.LADamage + Skill.LADamage + Set.LADamage + FlameDamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + DamageDone

LAFrostStaff.title: Light Attack Frost Staff
compute: 1 + CP.LADamage + Skill.LADamage + Set.LADamage + FrostDamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + DamageDone

LAShockStaff.title: Light Attack Shock Staff
compute: 1 + CP.HADamage + Skill.HADamage + Set.HADamage + Buff.Empower + ShockDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + DotDamageDone + DamageDone

LARestorationStaff.title: Light Attack Restoration
compute: 1 + CP.HADamage + Skill.HADamage + Set.HADamage + Buff.Empower + MagicDamageDone + DotDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + DamageDone

LAUnarmed.title: Light Attack Unarmed
compute: 1 + CP.LADamage + Skill.LADamage + Set.LADamage + Set.LAMeleeDamage + PhysicalDamageDone + DamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone

LAOneHand.title: Light Attack One Hand
compute: 1 + CP.LADamage + Skill.LADamage + Set.LADamage + Set.LAMeleeDamage + PhysicalDamageDone + DamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone

LATwoHand.title: Light Attack Two Hand
compute: 1 + CP.LADamage + Skill.LADamage + Set.LADamage + Set.LAMeleeDamage + PhysicalDamageDone + DamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone

LABow.title: Light Attack Bow
compute: 1 + CP.LADamage + Skill.LADamage + Set.LADamage + BowDamageDone + PhysicalDamageDone + DamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + SkillLineDamage.Bow

LADualWield.title: Light Attack Dual Wield
compute: 1 + CP.LADamage + Skill.LADamage + Set.LADamage + Set.LAMeleeDamage + PhysicalDamageDone + DamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + SkillLineDamage.Dual_Wield

LAWerewolf.title: Light Attack Werewolf
compute: 1 + CP.LADamage + Skill.LADamage + Set.LADamage + Set.LAMeleeDamage + PhysicalDamageDone + DamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone

LAOverload.title: Light Attack Overload
compute: 1 + CP.LADamage + Skill.LADamage + Set.LADamage + ShockDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + DirectDamageDone + DamageDone + OverloadDamage

HAFlameStaff.title: Heavy Attack Fire Staff
compute: 1 + CP.HADamage + Skill.HADamage + Set.HADamage + FlameDamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + DamageDone + Buff.Empower

HAFrostStaff.title: Heavy Attack Frost Staff
compute: 1 + CP.HADamage + Skill.HADamage + Set.HADamage + FrostDamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + DamageDone + Buff.Empower

HAShockStaffFinal.title: HA Shock Staff Final
compute: 1 + CP.HADamage + Skill.HADamage + Set.HADamage + ShockDamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + DamageDone + Buff.Empower

compute: 1 + CP.HADamage + Skill.HADamage + Set.HADamage + ShockDamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + DamageDone + Buff.Empower

compute: 1 + CP.HADamage + Skill.HADamage + Set.HADamage + PhysicalDamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + DamageDone + BowDamageDone + Buff.Empower + SkillLineDamage.Bow

compute: 1 + CP.HADamage + Skill.HADamage + Set.HADamage + PhysicalDamageDone + DirectDamageDone + SingleTargetDamageDone + DamageDone + Buff.Empower + SkillLineDamage.Dual_Wield
